title: Browse ItPay V3 Service Catalog
purpose: Teach the agent how to browse and display available catalog services to the buyer.
when_to_use: The buyer wants to see available services before purchasing.
The agent needs to know valid item / variant / offer IDs for cart or buy commands.
The buyer asks 'what can I buy?' or 'show me services'.

commands.success_signal: Catalog version, item count, and item details with variants and prices are printed.

output_interpretation.item_format: Each item shows catalog_item_id, title, provider, service_type, category, and a list of variants with catalog_variant_id, offer_id, title, amount, currency.
output_interpretation.variant_selection: To buy, the buyer needs catalog_item_id, catalog_variant_id, and offer_id from the output.
output_interpretation.price_note: amount_minor is in minor units (e.g., 10000 = 100.00 CNY). The CLI formats prices as XX.YY currency automatically.

agent_rules: Use `itpay catalog list` before suggesting purchase options.
Read the variant IDs and prices from the output; do not invent them.
Present options to the buyer in a readable table or list format.
If the buyer wants to search by keyword, filter the catalog output client-side (no backend search yet).

next_docs.condition: Buyer selected a service and wants to purchase
